aboutPreview.heading: About me
aboutPreview.bio1: I'm a software architect passionate about creating digital experiences that make a difference. With years of experience across diverse projects, I combine architectural vision with robust code to deliver solutions that exceed expectations.
aboutPreview.bio2: My approach is user-centered and results-driven. I believe technology should serve people, and every project is an opportunity to create something that truly impacts lives and businesses.

aboutPage.title: About
aboutPage.metaDescription: Meet Luan Campos K. — Software architect with experience creating creative and high-performance digital experiences.

aboutBio.heading: About me
aboutBio.paragraph1: I'm a software architect with experience building digital products that blend creative design with high-quality engineering. Currently working as software architect at Kyntech Group and as fullstack developer at Yampi. My journey started with a curiosity about how things work on the web — and grew into a passion for creating experiences that truly matter.
aboutBio.paragraph2: Over the years, I've worked with startups, agencies, and tech companies, always striving for the right balance between performance, accessibility, and aesthetics. I believe the best code is the one that serves people — invisible to the user, yet powerful behind the scenes.
aboutBio.paragraph3: My approach is user-centered and results-driven. Every project is an opportunity to solve real problems, simplify complexity, and deliver measurable value. I thrive on challenges that push me out of my comfort zone and allow me to learn something new.

kyntech.description: Architecting SaaS and ERP solutions with Next.js and Supabase. Overseeing frontend and backend teams, defining technical standards and code review.

yampi.description: Maintaining e-commerce stores and building ERP integration APIs. Developing bidirectional sync solutions with Node.js and Fastify.

freelancer.description: Building landing pages, small ERPs and virtual catalogs for various clients. Consulting for companies looking to migrate legacy systems to modern platforms.
